form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 6th over 390m at Shepparton beaten 6 lengths (23.07) behind Extra Sharp in a Bottom Up - Grade 7 on March 26. Key chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels approaching the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on March 19 over 400m at Warragul behind Memphis Mack beaten 13 lengths (24.16) in a T3 RSTW. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on March 19 over 400m at Warragul behind Memphis Mack beaten 13 lengths (24.16) in a T3 RSTW. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth on March 26 over 390m at Shepparton behind Extra Sharp, beaten 7 lengths (23.15) in a Bottom Up - Grade 7. Will find this a little easier. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished eighth on March 26 over 390m at Shepparton behind Extra Sharp, beaten 7 lengths (23.15) in a Bottom Up - Grade 7. Will find this a little easier. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.02) at this track in a T3 Grade 7, finishing fourth and beaten 1.3 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Among the chances on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.02) at this track in a T3 Grade 7, finishing fourth and beaten 1.3 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by half a length in 17.48, beating Little Splinter. Last start finished last in a T3 Grade 7 on January 23 over 300m at this track behind Getting Nervous beaten 6 lengths (17.62). Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a T3 RSTW on April 2 over 425m at Bendigo behind Paw Vanna beaten 10 lengths (25.08). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at Warragul. Hard to recommend this time.
